emails.body: Are you doing this? What are you ordering? Forwarded by Stacy E Dickson/HOU/ECT on 12/14/00 10:47 AM The ClickAtHome Project Team@ENRON Sent by: Enron Announcements@ENRON 12/06/00 10:57 AM

emails.subject: Re: ClickAtHome Pilot Two - IMPORTANT - PC Ordering Starts Today!
emails.subject_base: ClickAtHome Pilot Two - IMPORTANT - PC Ordering Starts Today!
emails.body: Re: ClickAtHome Pilot Two IMPORTANT PC Ordering Starts Today! So you do check your mail. Yes, I am doing this. I ordered my equipment yesterday. I went with the Advanced Desktop. The difference was $333. I also paid for additional upgrades of speed and memory. Call me if you want specifics. It works best if you use the telephone line when ordering, at least that is what the Dell representative sold me on. Stacy E Dickson 12/14/2000 10:50 AM
